pkgdown/extra_head.html

Skip to contents
OptSLDP 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Get started
    • OptSLDP: An Optimized Selective Linkage Disequilibrium Pruning Pipeline
  • Changelog

Package index

Main pipeline

End-to-end SLDP workflow. Two files in, one pruned genotype file out.

run_sldp()
Run the Selective Linkage Disequilibrium Pruning (SLDP) pipeline
extract_final_geno()
Extract the final genotype matrix from a GDS-strategy run

Input / output

Readers for numeric dosage, HapMap, and VCF genotype formats; phenotype reader with multi-trait and sample-alignment support; writers for numeric dosage and HapMap output; pruning report writer.

read_genotype()
Dispatch genotype reading by format
clean_genotype_file()
Clean a malformed genotype file by removing lines with wrong column counts
read_numeric_genotype()
Read numeric dosage genotype data
read_hapmap_genotype()
Read HapMap genotype data
read_vcf_genotype()
Read VCF genotype data
read_phenotype()
Read phenotype and covariate data (supports single or multiple traits)
write_numeric_genotype()
Write numeric dosage genotype file
write_hapmap_genotype()
Write HapMap genotype file
write_pruning_report()
Write pruning statistics report

Quality control

Minor allele frequency computation and filtering; high-LD pre-pruning to remove near-duplicate markers before the main pipeline.

compute_maf()
Compute allele frequency and minor allele frequency for every SNP
filter_snps_by_maf()
Filter SNPs by minor allele frequency
preprune_high_ld()
Chromosome-wise high-LD pre-pruning

Screening and candidate selection

Marginal SNP screening with optional covariate adjustment; three candidate selection modes (p-value, effect size, hybrid).

compute_screening_stats()
Compute marginal screening statistics
select_candidate_snps()
Select candidate SNPs by screening threshold

LD computation and pruning

Scale-aware pairwise r² computation; important-SNP expansion by positional window and LD neighbourhood; background LD pruning.

compute_r2_subset()
Compute pairwise LD (r^2) for a subset of SNPs
find_ld_neighbors()
Find LD neighbors for a focal SNP
expand_important_snps()
Expand candidate SNPs into the full set of important (protected) SNPs
prune_background_snps()
LD-prune background (non-important) SNPs chromosome-wise

Example data

Synthetic dataset for demonstrating and testing the pipeline. Contains genotype matrix, phenotype vectors, GWAS results, and ground-truth QTN tables for 40 SNPs and 50 samples.

example_optsldp
Example data for OptSLDP

Example data

Synthetic dataset for demonstrating and testing the pipeline. Contains genotype matrix, phenotype vectors, GWAS results, and ground-truth QTN tables for 40 SNPs and 50 samples.

example_optsldp
Example data for OptSLDP
